titlestmt.titleproper: Saint Charles, Ill. Congregational Church of Lily Lake records, 1945-1964.
titlestmt.author: Adrianna Keller-Wyman

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 8, 2026 at 13:59

did.unittitle: Saint Charles, Ill. Congregational Church of Lily Lake records, 1945-1964.
did.abstract: The Congregational Church of Lily Lake was organized in 1914 and was still in operation in Saint Charles, Illinois as of 2022. This collection contains a volume of financial records from the church from 1945-1964, including expenditures and receipts.

corpname.part: Congregational Church of Lily Lake (Saint Charles, Ill.)

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to this collection is unrestricted and open to the public.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on use
userestrict.p: Items in this collection are subject to U.S. Copyright Law. It is the responsibility of the researcher to determine the copyright status of collection items and to secure any permissions necessary for their reproduction and publication. Requests for permission to publish material must be discussed with the archivist or librarian.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], in the Saint Charles, Ill. Congregational Church of Lily Lake records, 1945-1964, RG5245. The Congregational Library & Archives, Boston, MA.

acqinfo.head: Acquisition information
acqinfo.p: Materials were donated to the Congregational Library & Archives by Chicago Theoligcal Seminary in November 2014; accession number 2014-92.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This collection was processed by Adrianna Keller-Wyman, April 2026, according to the rules of Describing Archives: A Content Standard.

bioghist.head: Historical Note
bioghist.p: The Congregational Church of Lily Lake was organized in 1914. The church was a member of the UCC from 1961-2004. As of 1960, it was located in Saint Charles, Illinois, where it was still in operation as of 2022.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection contains a volume of financial records from 1945-1964, including expenditures and receipts.

corpname.part: Congregational Church of Lily Lake (Saint Charles, Ill.)
